## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Galileo and Growth X, discussing Growth X's AI-powered marketing services and Galileo's needs.](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Growth X has developed an AI-powered platform for marketing workflows, recently raising $12M in Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Galileo faces challenges with lead conversion (2.3% rate) and lacks a dedicated demand gen team](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in deeper collaboration, including Galileo potentially using Growth X's services and providing access to Galileo's tech](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)

## Topics

### Growth X's Platform and Business Model

  - [Built AI workflows as code for marketing tasks, with a runtime layer for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Currently at $6.2M ARR with 39 customers, doubling in size in 6 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=826.0)
  - [Transitioning from services to potential product/API offerings in the future](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [Focus on AI and expert collaboration for complex knowledge tasks, starting with marketing](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)

### Galileo's Marketing Challenges

  - [No dedicated demand gen team; relying on 4 SDRs (only 2 performing well)](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [1,200 de-duped leads last quarter, growing 60% QoQ](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Low 2.3% conversion rate on inbound leads](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Need for better lead enrichment, routing, and qualification](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Using Growth X's AI-powered workflows to improve Galileo's lead handling and conversion](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Exploring use cases for Galileo's technology within Growth X's platform, particularly for evaluations and feedback loops](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Potential case study opportunity for both companies](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1752.0)

### Growth X's Technology Demo

  - [Showed examples of AI-powered research and persona development workflows](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [Demonstrated ability to generate detailed company and product research in minutes](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1672.0)
  - [Highlighted the code-based approach to workflow creation and management](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to compile a list of specific pain points and challenges for Growth X to address](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=2141.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up meeting (1-2 hours) in the coming weeks to brainstorm solutions](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=2114.0)
  - [Growth X to discuss potential Galileo integration with their CTO](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=2178.0)
  - [Explore terms for Galileo to access Growth X services and vice versa](https://fathom.video/share/2pX1VptcyZrzsxZwWQexz2D-Mez_qrKR?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
